name: DataNexus MCP
description: AI-Ready access to US/UK nonprofit data and OSS vulnerability intelligence. T04: US nonprofits via IRS EO BMF + IRS TEOS, UK charities via Charity Commission England and Wales. T10: CVEs via Google OSV.dev, dependency graphs via deps.dev, CVE detail via NIST NVD, SBOM auditing, licence lookups. Token-efficient AI-Ready Markdown. No API key required.

tools.name: fetch_nonprofit_by_ein
tools.description: US nonprofit lookup by EIN. Sources: IRS EO BMF + IRS TEOS.

ein.description: EIN in XX-XXXXXXX or XXXXXXXXX format

tools.name: search_nonprofits_by_name
tools.description: Search US nonprofits by name. Source: IRS EO BMF.

tools.name: fetch_charity_uk
tools.description: UK charity registration data from Charity Commission England and Wales (CCEW). UK GDPR purpose-limitation: due-diligence use only.

charity_number_or_name.description: UK charity registration number or name

tools.name: fetch_package_vulnerabilities
tools.description: Known CVEs for an open-source package + version. Source: Google OSV.dev.

tools.name: fetch_dependency_graph
tools.description: Transitive dependency graph for a package version. Source: deps.dev (Google). Hard 8s timeout.

tools.name: fetch_cve_detail
tools.description: Full CVE detail with CVSS v3 scores and affected CPEs. Source: NIST NVD.

tools.name: audit_sbom_vulnerabilities
tools.description: Audit a CycloneDX or SPDX SBOM against Google OSV.dev.

sbom_json.description: CycloneDX or SPDX SBOM as a JSON string

tools.name: fetch_package_licence
tools.description: SPDX licence identifier for an open-source package version. Source: deps.dev (Google).
